subject_pattern: URGENT UPDATE: Level {N} of 5 - {DAY} {DATE} Severe Storm Threat - {AREA}
subject_examples: URGENT UPDATE: Level 4 of 5 - Wed Jun 17 Severe Storm Threat - Your County, ST
tone: Bold, direct. Reference the SPC level (1-5) if known. 'FORECAST ESCALATED since {previous_time}'.
send_when: Risk level escalated since the previous email.
